⚠ Compliance Deadline

State & local government WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required as of April 2026. Healthcare Section 504 deadline: May 11, 2026.

Am I compliant? →

● FREE TOOL

Free PDF Accessibility Checker

Upload any PDF and get an instant compliance audit against Section 508, ADA Title II, and WCAG 2.2. Get pass/fail results with real-world impact explanations and step-by-step remediation guidance — at no cost.

★★★★★ 5.0 Google Rating · GSA & NASPO Contracted
✓ Instant audit with pass/fail results, real-world impact analysis, and certified remediation guidance.

    No spam. We may follow up about fixing any issues we found.

    checks passed

    Issues found? We fix PDFs for full compliance.

    Our certified specialists remediate PDFs to meet Section 508, ADA, and WCAG 2.2 requirements. Fast turnaround. GSA & NASPO contract ordering available.

    Fix My PDF → Get a Free Quote
    How It Works

    What We Check

    Our scanner checks 12 accessibility criteria required under Section 508, ADA Title II, and WCAG 2.2 Level AA.

    🏷️

    Document Structure

    Tagged PDF, reading order, heading hierarchy, bookmarks — the scaffolding screen readers rely on.

    🖼️

    Content Accessibility

    Alt text on images, selectable text layer, meaningful link text — what makes content understandable.

    📋

    Metadata & Forms

    Document title, language, author, and form field labels — the invisible properties that matter for compliance.

    Section 508 · ADA Title II · WCAG 2.2 · GSA & NASPO Contracted

    Need your PDFs professionally remediated?

    We fix PDFs to meet full compliance requirements. Fast turnaround, certified specialists, and GSA/NASPO contract ordering available for government agencies.

    PDF Remediation Services → Get a Free Quote

    Language Access Hub

    Certified translation, interpretation, ADA/Section 508 compliance, and AI automation for government agencies, school districts, and nonprofits — all 50 states, 300+ languages.
